description: Docker compose mounts the host docker socket

finding.title: Docker socket mounted into container
finding.detail: A compose file mounts /var/run/docker.sock. Any process in that container can often control the host Docker daemon.
finding.remediation: Remove docker.sock mounts. If you need build/deploy workflows, isolate them in a separate trusted service.

description: Compose mounts broad home directories into container

finding.title: Broad home directory mount detected
finding.detail: Compose config appears to mount a broad home directory path into a container, exposing private keys and credentials.
finding.remediation: Mount only a dedicated project subdirectory, and prefer read-only mounts where possible.
